zh.Fay, Orne, Normandie, France: 法國諾門迪奧內費爾受鞭刑案
zh.lifeSummary: 當marguerite DE NOYERS,於從1250年1月8日到1251年1月7日出生在法國皮卡迪奧易諾時，她的父親Milon VIII de Noyers37歲，母親Alixent Hélissende des Barres26歲。她於1263年與Jean de Vergy I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年之後。

zh-hans.Fay, Orne, Normandie, France: 法国諾門迪奧內費爾受鞭刑案
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当marguerite DE NOYERS,于从1250年1月8日到1251年1月7日出生在法国皮卡迪奧易諾时，她的父亲Milon VIII de Noyers37岁，母亲Alixent Hélissende des Barres26岁。她于1263年与Jean de Vergy I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年之后。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: NOYERS,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Bowyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

nameMeanings.name: marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When marguerite DE NOYERS, was born from 8 January 1250 to 7 January 1251, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Milon VIII de Noyers, was 37 and her mother, Alixent Hélissende des Barres, was 26. She married Jean de Vergy I in 1263. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1310.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque marguerite DE NOYERS, est née du 8 janvier 1250 au 7 janvier 1251, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Milon VIII de Noyers, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alixent Hélissende des Barres, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Vergy I en 1263. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1310.

de.lifeSummary: Als marguerite DE NOYERS, von 8. Januar 1250 bis 7. Januar 1251 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Milon VIII de Noyers 37 und ihre Mutter Alixent Hélissende des Barres 26. Sie hat 1263 Jean de Vergy I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1310.

it.lifeSummary: Quando marguerite DE NOYERS, è nata il da 8 gennaio 1250 a 7 gennaio 1251 nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Milon VIII de Noyers, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Alixent Hélissende des Barres, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Vergy I nel 1263. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1310.

ja.lifeSummary: marguerite DE NOYERS,がから1250年1月8日まで1251年1月7日にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンで生まれた時，父Milon VIII de Noyersは37歳，母Alixent Hélissende des Barresは26歳であった。1263年にJean de Vergy Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: marguerite DE NOYERS,(이)가 1250년 1월 8일부터 1251년 1월 7일까지 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Milon VIII de Noyers(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alixent Hélissende des Barres(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1263년 Jean de Vergy I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando marguerite DE NOYERS, nasceu de 8 de janeiro de 1250 a 7 de janeiro de 1251, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Milon VIII de Noyers, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alixent Hélissende des Barres, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Vergy I em 1263. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1310.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда marguerite DE NOYERS, родилась с 8 января 1250 по 7 января 1251 в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Milon VIII de Noyers было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alixent Hélissende des Barres, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Vergy I в 1263 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1310 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando marguerite DE NOYERS, nació desde 8 de enero de 1250 hasta 7 de enero de 1251, en Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Milon VIII de Noyers, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alixent Hélissende des Barres, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jean de Vergy I en 1263. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1310.
